response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java proficiency for the role, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level positions inconsistent with an entry-level junior developer role, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and team integration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: Only basic German proficiency — fails critical language requirement for client-facing roles
Overqualified with senior titles, inconsistent with entry-level position expectations
Java experience is minimal and not highlighted as a primary skill despite being core to the role
